intro: Between 12 and 23 April 2026, ZCyberNews covered 32 ransomware incidents, with The Gentlemen, Kyber, and Payouts King emerging as the top threat actors. The most critical vulnerability observed was CVE-2026-1731, carrying a CVSS score of 9.8, alongside CVE-2026-34197 at 8.8. The manufacturing, healthcare, logistics, and retail sectors were most affected, with Europe, the United States, and Turkey among the primary regions targeted. Of the 32 articles, 26 were classified as high severity, two as critical, and two as informational.
